title: Best Supplements for Fat Loss
who_for: People trying to lose fat while keeping the plan simple and stimulant-aware.
avoid_if: Stimulant sensitive, uncontrolled blood pressure, pregnancy, heart rhythm issues, or using stimulant medications.

title: Best Supplements for Muscle
who_for: Lifters and active adults who want a practical strength, volume, and workout-support stack.
avoid_if: Kidney disease, pregnancy, significant medical conditions, or if pre-workout vasodilators do not agree with you.

title: Best Supplements for Stress
who_for: People who want calmer days without building a complicated supplement routine.
avoid_if: Pregnancy, thyroid conditions, autoimmune conditions, sedative medications, or sensitivity to calming supplements.

title: Best Supplements for Sleep
who_for: People who want a simple nighttime support stack for winding down and sleep timing.
avoid_if: Pregnancy, sedative medications, untreated sleep apnea, shift-work complexity, or next-day grogginess from sleep aids.

title: Best Supplements for Cardiovascular Support
who_for: Adults looking for a clean heart-health support stack built around common evidence-aware compounds.
avoid_if: Blood thinners, blood pressure medications, upcoming surgery, fish allergy, or clinician-advised supplement restrictions.

title: Best Supplements for Cognition
who_for: People who want focused, low-clutter support for attention, mental effort, and long-term cognitive routines.
avoid_if: Cholinergic medications, sedatives, pregnancy, bipolar history, or if bacopa causes digestive side effects.

title: Best Supplements for Metabolic Support
who_for: People working on glucose, appetite, and meal-response habits alongside nutrition basics.
avoid_if: Diabetes medications, pregnancy, liver disease, low blood sugar episodes, or difficulty spacing fiber from medications.

title: Best Supplements for Detox Support
who_for: People who want liver and antioxidant-pathway support without cleanse hype or extreme protocols.
avoid_if: Pregnancy, active liver disease without medical guidance, blood thinners, chemotherapy, or sulfur sensitivity.
